title: OnceCell for lazy client init is correct and avoids construction-time network call
description: Using tokio::sync::OnceCell<kube::Client> for lazy client initialization ensures from_uri() never makes a network call (honoring the project's construction-only URI contract), and that the client is initialized at most once per K8sBackend instance regardless of concurrent get()/put() calls. A contributor might suggest initializing the client in from_uri() for simplicity — this would violate the SecretStore construction contract. The OnceCell approach is correct.
